code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn byte_at_unsafe(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    -1
  end
end

fn get_int(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match list.get(xs, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut starts: List<Int> = []
mut lens: List<Int> = []
mut counts: List<Int> = []

mut i = 0
while i < n
  while i < n and is_ws(byte_at_unsafe(input, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  let s = i
  while i < n and not is_ws(byte_at_unsafe(input, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  let e = i
  if e > s
    let tlen = e - s
    let tstr = string.substring(input, s, e)
    mut found = -1
    mut j = 0
    let m = list.len(counts)
    while j < m and found < 0
      let jl = get_int(lens, j)
      if jl == tlen
        let js = get_int(starts, j)
        let existing = string.substring(input, js, js + jl)
        if existing == tstr
          found = j
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    if found < 0
      starts = list.push(starts, s)
      lens = list.push(lens, tlen)
      counts = list.push(counts, 1)
    else
      mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
      mut k = 0
      let mc = list.len(counts)
      while k < mc
        let v = get_int(counts, k)
        if k == found
          new_counts = list.push(new_counts, v + 1)
        else
          new_counts = list.push(new_counts, v)
        end
        k = k + 1
      end
      counts = new_counts
    end
  end
end

mut best_count = 0
mut best_idx = -1
let total = list.len(counts)
mut p = 0
while p < total
  let c = get_int(counts, p)
  if c > best_count
    best_count = c
    best_idx = p
  end
  p = p + 1
end

if best_idx < 0
  println("top==0")
else
  let bs = get_int(starts, best_idx)
  let bl = get_int(lens, best_idx)
  let tok = string.substring(input, bs, bs + bl)
  println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
end
